name: Macaroni and Cheese with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil; cook pasta until al dente.
2. While pasta is cooking, in a medium saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons margarine over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and add flour, stirring until blended.
4. Whisk in vegetable stock and milk, stirring over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens.
5. Reduce heat to low; stir in cheeses and seasonings. Continue stirring until cheese is melted. Remove from heat and set aside.
6. In a large skillet, melt remaining 1 tablespoon margarine. Add mushrooms and cook vegetables, stirring constantly, for about 5 minutes, until tender/crisp.
7. Reduce heat to low; when noodles are done, drain well.
8. Toss with vegetables and cheese sauce; garnish with scallion curls.
